narrative_beat: Overhead tabuleiro xadrez com peças de países (EUA, Israel, China, Rússia) em cores ricas

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: a wide overhead view of an antique wooden chessboard with four national pieces: a gold eagle (USA), a crimson lion (Israel), an ochre dragon (China), and a bronze bear (Russia)
subject.focal_point: the four pieces converging at the center
subject.secondary: The pieces glow in rich colors while the chessboard itself is desaturated; vertical divine light descends on the board.

environment.location: an ancient war room with stone walls

composition.foreground: four national pieces in rich crimson, gold, ochre, bronze
composition.background: desaturated black-and-white stone walls beyond the board

lighting.key_light: vertical divine golden beam on center

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, dust particles, floating orange embers

symbolism.primary: nations racing to wield machine power

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
